titleStmt.title: SII 17.135: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 135. (A.R. No. 116 of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Puyalvāyttu etc., of Kulōttuṅga III. The uḷvari is dated in the 271st day of the 15th year of the king. It also mentions that some assessments were made respectively in the 29th and 32nd regual years of Rājēndra I and Rājādhirāja I (Vijaiyarājēndra, who died seated on an elephant).

It records the gift of 50 vēli of land in Kaṇḍigaimēlūr, a hamlet of Jayaṅgoṇḍachaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya of Mēṟkā-nāḍu in Rājarāja-valanāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, as a tax-free dēvadāṉa to the god at the temple of Tiruttiṉainagar. However two kinds of lands in it, wet and garden lands (nīrnilattōpādi-nilam and kollainilattōpādi-nilam) were to pay a levy (iṟaikaṭṭu) respectively at the rate of 35 and 15 kalams per vēli according to the demands of the variyilār and varikkūṟu śeyvār in the uḷvari.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu vaḷam perukap poyyāta nānmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppa
tirumakaḷuñ jayamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmatipoṟ koṭai viḷaṅka velventaraṭi vaṇaṅka maṇma
ṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉunīti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolun tikkaṉaittañ celu
ttak kaṟppakālam puvi kākkap poṟpamainta muṭi puṉaintu vāḻveṅkaiyu maṭamāṉum vanta
ruṇṇak koḷveṅkaikkoṭiyuyartti koṟṟavar taṅ koṭai paṇiyac cuṅkamillā
nāṭeṅkuñ coṟṟumalai kaṇṭaruḷit teṉṉavan vantaṭi paṇiyac ciṅkaḷavar talai malaiyāṟat teṉṉa
ṅkoḷka veṉṉat tiraik kaṭalai Aṭaikka veṉṉat teṉṉilaṅkaiyarkon talaiyarinta tiruneṭu
mālivaṉeṉṉat teṉṉavaṉait talaiyarintu tecamellām Iruḷakaṟṟip poṉṉumuttum pukaḻ maturaiyum pu
kkaṉaittuṅ koṇṭaruḷit tikkāṉai yirunāṉkuñ jayañceytu koṭi vāṅkik kaṉṉaṭaruṅ kāliṅkarun teṉ
ṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷaru mutalāya maṉṉavarkaḷ tiṟaiku ccevippac cempoṉ virasindandāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟi
runtaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa ṉac cakkaravaṟtikaḷ maturaikoṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya ci kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu
patiṉaiñcāvatu tiripuvaṉaccakkaravaṟti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu ninṟum Irājarājavaḷaṉāṭṭu mutalāṉa meṟkāṉāṭṭup
brammadeśam jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai tiruttiṉainakar Uṭaiyār tiruttiṉainakaruṭaiyār koyil devarkanmikkum śrīmāhe
śuvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum sīkāriyañ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Ivvūṟ piṭākai kaṇṭikaimelūril mun Iṟai kaṭṭinapaṭi tavir
ttu Aimpatiṟṟu velinilam patiṉaiñcāvatu pacāṉa mutal devatāṉa Iṟaiyili Āka Iṭṭum Innilattu nirnilattopāti nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku nellu muppattaiyakal
muṅ kollai ttopāti nilattukku Iv Oṉṟukku nellup patiṉakalamāka Iṟai kaṭṭiyum variyilārum varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari taraccoṉṉom Innilam patiṉaiñ
cāvatu pacāṉamutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nivantañ celuttap paṇṇuka Eḻutinān tirumantiraOlai neṟiyuṭaiccoḻa muventaveḷār Eḻuttum Ivai kurukula rāyan Eḻuttum viḻiññatta
raiyan Eḻuttum Ivai pāṇṭiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttum Ivai Amarakon Eḻuttum Ivai nikarilicoḻappallavaraiyan Eḻuttum Iṭṭum patiṉaiñcāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu Eḻupattu Onṟinṉāl pra
sādam cetaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟeḻupattoṉ ṟiṉāl tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭi virutarācapuyaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu niṉṟum Irājarājavaḷanā
ṭu mutalāna meṟkānāṭṭu brammatecam ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai tiruttiṉainakar Uṭaiyār tiruttiṉainakar Uṭaiyāṟku veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷuk kiṟuppatāka Ivvūr
Iṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭi taviṟtu yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilam Aiympatiṟṟu
10 3va�ta 3 māviṉāl payirppaṭi ḷa 100 3 9 100 29� kā �yiṉāl � vilaippaṭi ḷa 3 100 � nta
ḷa ḷa nta � Āka ḷa 100 3 10 9 ḷa 42 pūrvadeśamuṅ keṅkaiyuṅ kaṭāramuṅ koṇṭaruḷina Irājentiracoḻadevaṟku 2 10 9vatu niccayitta Opāti I 3 100 10 7 ḷ � 43 ta Āṉaimeṟ tuñciyaruḷiya vicaiyarājen
tiratevaṟku 3 10 3vatu Iṟai kaṭṭina Opāti ḷa 2 100 4 ḷ � 3 nta yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu pacāna mutal devatāna Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamaikku Innilattu nirnilattopāti nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku nellu muppattaiṅ
kalamuṅ kollai nilattopāti nilattukku veli Oṉṟukku nelilu patiṅkalamumāka vanta nellu patiṉaiñcāvatu pacāṉamutal Iṟaikaṭṭāka koḻvatu puravari cikaraṇanaāyakam perunallūruṭai
puravari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu tiypattarayaṉ Eḻuttu puravari ci karaṇattu mukaveṭṭi kumāramaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu nūṟampātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇa nāyakam panta
Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇanāyakam kurukāṭi kiḻāṉ Eḻuttu vaṉnāṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ilāṭat taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇanāyakam melūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu puravari cikaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu pura
Digital edition of SII 17.135 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
